name: Fudgiest Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and baking chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
3. Beat in the remaining ingredients by hand until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch x 12-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes, or until set.
